identity.name: Avec les Patriotes d'Israël
identity.tone: Dignified, Strong, Patriotic, Modern, Institutional yet Bold
identity.persona: The French-Israeli bridge. Serious governance meets fighting spirit.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-serif font-bold tracking-tight leading-none
scale.caption: text-sm font-sans font-medium uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500
scale.slogan: text-6xl md:text-9xl font-accent font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-[0.8]

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200
header.nav_links: font-medium text-slate-700 hover:text-[#002395] transition-colors uppercase tracking-wide text-sm

buttons.primary: rounded-none px-8 py-3 bg-[#002395] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#001b7a] transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: rounded-none px-8 py-3 border-2 border-[#002395] text-[#002395] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#002395] hover:text-white transition-all

cards.candidate: bg-white border border-slate-100 p-0 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow group relative
cards.feature: p-8 bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-[#002395] hover:bg-white hover:shadow-lg transition-all

forms.input: rounded-none border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002395] focus:border-transparent bg-slate-50
forms.label: font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider mb-2 block

home.hero_layout: Split screen or heavy typography overlay on dimmed background

program.layout: Zig-zag layout or Bento grid for the 4 commitments

donate.currency_toggle: Switch component customized with ILS/EUR labels

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' font specifically for the 'RUPTURE' slogan to give it that 'Strike' impact.
The '18' amount in donation is symbolic (Chai - Life). Highlight it slightly.
Ensure the countdown timer targets May 30, 2026.
Use the provided Michel Ayach photo in the Hero or About section, ensure it's high quality and well cropped.
The footer must include legal disclaimers for political campaigning (placeholders like 'Mentions Légales').
For the 'Liste' page, separate candidates by Tel-Aviv and Haïfa regions visually.
Use the 'Israeli flag circular' logo in the header.
Animation: Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (fade-up) on scroll. Keep it subtle and dignified.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use the defined Fusion gradient only for key branding elements.
Avoid rounded corners > 4px. Keep it sharp and institutional.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility, especially with the blue text.
Mobile responsiveness is critical for campaign updates on the go.
Use 'sonner' for form submission success messages.
